CustomField.description: If populated, generated checklist items from this template default their Responsibility to the active User whose FederationIdentifier matches this value, overriding the Deal Team Contract role. Falls back to the Contract role if the user cannot be resolved.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: FederationIdentifier of the user to default Responsibility to. Leave blank to use the Deal Team Contract role.
CustomField.label: Default Responsibility Federation Id
